meta.title: PT Victorindo Kimiatama — Indonesia's Trusted Paint & Coating Specialist Since 1978
meta.description: PT Victorindo Kimiatama is Indonesia's first trusted specialist in automotive paint and coating solutions, delivering excellent coating products across multiple industries since 1978.

hero.heading: Indonesia's Trusted Paint & Coating Specialist Since 1978
hero.lede: PT Victorindo Kimiatama is Indonesia's first trusted specialist in automotive paint and coating solutions — one of Indonesia's long-established coating manufacturers, delivering excellent coating products across multiple industries.
hero.imageAlt: Aerial view of the PT Victorindo Kimiatama manufacturing facility in Karawang, West Java

story.heading: Our Story & Heritage
story.p1: Since its establishment in 1978 in Palmerah, Jakarta, PT Victorindo Kimiatama has grown from Indonesia's first automotive paint specialist into a nationally recognized world-class coating manufacturer, driven by over four decades of innovation and dedication.
story.p2: Proudly made in Indonesia — every formulation is developed, produced, and quality-tested entirely within the country.
story.imageAlt: VK production operator transferring raw material into a stainless-steel mixing tank

sectors.heading: Three Pillars of Excellence
sectors.lede: Specialized coating solutions across three distinct industry verticals.

cards.title: Automotive Paints
cards.desc: High-performance paint systems engineered for automotive bodyshops, bus karoseri manufacturers, and OEM assembly operations.
cards.imageAlt: Blinken clear coat polyurethane can on the VK filling line

cards.title: Marine, Offshore & Protective
cards.desc: Industrial-grade protective coatings designed for the harshest environments — from offshore platforms to heavy steel structures.
cards.imageAlt: Barge protected with VK marine coating at a shipyard

cards.title: Architectural Coatings
cards.desc: Premium decorative and protective coatings for residential, commercial, and large-scale construction projects across Indonesia.
cards.imageAlt: FOX Lite hotel building finished with VK architectural coatings

manufacturing.heading: Trusted Manufacturing
manufacturing.lede: Per shift per month production capacity across all product lines, powered by modern manufacturing equipment and expert formulation teams.
manufacturing.capacityAria: Production capacity in metric tons per shift per month
manufacturing.imageAlt: Blinken cans moving along the VK filling and packing line

trust.label: Proven Track Record — Trusted by Leading Companies

certs.heading: Certified for Excellence
certs.lede: Our triple ISO certification demonstrates our unwavering commitment to quality management, environmental responsibility, and occupational health & safety.

cards.subtitle: Quality Management System
cards.desc: Ensures products and processes consistently meet customer and regulatory standards.

cards.subtitle: Environmental Management System
cards.desc: Demonstrates our commitment to minimizing environmental impact through responsible manufacturing.

cards.subtitle: Occupational Health & Safety
cards.desc: Protects our workforce through effective workplace health and safety management.

ctaBand.label: Our Commitment
ctaBand.heading: Building the Future of the Indonesian Coating Industry.
